since_last: 38% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.76%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.36% · BTC -1.50% · Gold -2.00% · Nasdaq100 -1.13%. 38% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.76%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.76%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.13%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, INTU +5.87%, CRM +4.99%, WDAY +4.63%, TTD +4.48%. Laggards: APP -9.49%, ARM -5.74%, MRVL -5.26%, LRCX -4.64%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.63% at $138.57
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
